data.name: IamError.DatabaseError
data.value: A database error occurred during IAM operation.

data.name: IamError.InternalServerError
data.value: An unexpected internal error occurred in IAM.

data.name: IamError.ExternalServiceError
data.value: An external service error occurred in IAM.

data.name: ProfilesError.DatabaseError
data.value: A database error occurred during profile operation.

data.name: ProfilesError.InternalServerError
data.value: An unexpected internal error occurred in Profiles.

data.name: PublishingError.DuplicateTutorialTitle
data.value: A tutorial with title {0} already exists.

data.name: PublishingError.DatabaseError
data.value: A database error occurred during publishing operation.

data.name: PublishingError.InternalServerError
data.value: An unexpected internal error occurred in Publishing.

data.name: TripNotFound
data.value: The specified trip was not found.

data.name: InvalidTripState
data.value: The trip is not in a valid state for this operation.

data.name: RouteNotFound
data.value: The specified route was not found.

data.name: InvalidRouteState
data.value: The route is not in a valid state for this operation.

data.name: FleetError.RouteNotFound
data.value: The specified route was not found.

data.name: FleetError.InvalidRouteState
data.value: The route is not in a valid state for this operation.

data.name: FleetError.DatabaseError
data.value: A database error occurred during the route operation.

data.name: FleetError.InternalServerError
data.value: An unexpected internal error occurred during the route operation.

data.name: TripError.TripNotFound
data.value: The specified trip was not found.

data.name: TripError.InvalidTripState
data.value: The trip is not in a valid state for this operation.

data.name: TripError.DatabaseError
data.value: A database error occurred during the trip operation.

data.name: TripError.InternalServerError
data.value: An unexpected internal error occurred during the trip operation.

data.name: StakeholderError.InvalidStudentGroupState
data.value: The student group is not in a valid state for this operation.

data.name: StakeholderError.DatabaseError
data.value: A database error occurred during the stakeholder operation.

data.name: StakeholderError.InternalServerError
data.value: An unexpected internal error occurred during the stakeholder operation.

data.name: SubscriptionError.DatabaseError
data.value: A database error occurred during the subscription operation.

data.name: SubscriptionError.InternalServerError
data.value: An unexpected internal error occurred during the subscription operation.

data.name: NotificationError.DatabaseError
data.value: A database error occurred during the notification operation.

data.name: NotificationError.InternalServerError
data.value: An unexpected internal error occurred during the notification operation.
